F1.biggest_miss: underestimated magnitude of afternoon extension and closing flush

F2.biggest_miss: structural call strong but downside targets too conservative for late-session liquidation

F3.biggest_miss: nailed the ceiling but did not price in the true washout into close

evolution: monotonic_improvement: F1 caught regime, F2 upgraded structure, F3 capped upside precisely
lessons: On trend days, widen downside close/LOD bands after each failed rally
Use close_near_extreme tag more aggressively — include trend-day extreme in range
Separate regime accuracy from magnitude accuracy
After 14:00 on weak trend days, prioritize liquidation scenarios
Anchor HOD by time elapsed — cap upside odds earlier after opening failure
summary: All 3 forecasts got direction right (short bias profitable across all). F1 identified regime, F2 confirmed bear-flag structure, F3 delivered tactical map. Systematic weakness: underestimating trend-day downside magnitude. Direction/structure read was strong; range expansion was underpriced.
